channel.title: Frontion News
channel.description: Strategic intelligence, delivered daily. Geopolitical briefings read aloud — listen on the go.
channel.itunes:author: Frontion News
channel.itunes:summary: Frontion News delivers concise, authoritative briefings on global geopolitics, defense, energy, finance, and technology — now available as daily audio.

item.title: China Growth Misses Target, Senate Blocks Defence Bill Over Iran Provisions, US Consumer Prices Drop Sharly — Global Brief, July 15, 2026
item.description: China's Q2 GDP slips to 4.3%, Senate Democrats sink the defence authorisation over war powers, and US inflation posts its biggest monthly drop in years — but the reprieve may not last as oil surges on Hormuz disruptions.
item.itunes:title: China Growth Misses Target, Senate Blocks Defence Bill Over Iran Provisions, US Consumer Prices Drop Sharly

item.title: Nine Nations Back Ukraine's Freyja Interceptor, US Ammo Production Stalls, NATO Picks Saab Over Boeing for AWACS Replacement — Defence & Industry Brief, July 15, 2026
item.description: Nine European nations formally joined Ukraine's Freyja anti-ballistic missile coalition with a one-year deployment target, a DoD Inspector General report revealed the Army's 155-mm shell production is stuck at 36% of its goal, and NATO chose Saab's GlobalEye over Boeing's E-7 Wedgetail for its next radar plane — a $4.5B decision shaped by Washington's own budget whiplash.
item.itunes:title: Nine Nations Back Ukraine's Freyja Interceptor, US Ammo Production Stalls, NATO Picks Saab Over Boeing for AWACS Replacement

item.title: Oil Surges Past $87 on Dual-Front Escalation, China Crude Imports Hit Decade Low, and France Cuts 6.4 GW Nuclear — Energy & Power Brief, July 15, 2026
item.description: Brent jumped nearly 15% in a week as Black Sea attacks and renewed Hormuz disruption hit simultaneously, China's June crude imports plunged to the lowest since 2016, and France slashed 6.4 GW of nuclear output during a record heatwave — the energy market is being squeezed from every direction.
item.itunes:title: Oil Surges Past $87 on Dual-Front Escalation, China Crude Imports Hit Decade Low, and France Cuts 6.4 GW Nuclear

item.title: US Inflation Drops Sharply as Senate Blocks War Spending, New York Bans Data Centres, Indonesia Jails Gojek Founder — Finance & Markets Brief, July 15, 2026
item.description: June CPI fell 0.4% monthly as energy prices plunged, but analysts warn the reprieve is already fading as Gulf oil climbs back above $80. Senate Democrats blocked a $1.15 trillion defence bill over Iran war powers and Israel intelligence-sharing provisions, while New York became the first US state to ban large data centre construction.
item.itunes:title: US Inflation Drops Sharply as Senate Blocks War Spending, New York Bans Data Centres, Indonesia Jails Gojek Founder

item.title: Apple Sues OpenAI for Trade Secret Theft, China's AI Agent Rules Take Effect, Gulf States Locked Into Nvidia — Tech Brief, July 15, 2026
item.description: Apple's lawsuit against OpenAI exposes the fierce battle for hardware talent as AI companies race to control the full product stack, while China implements sweeping regulations on humanlike AI agents and Gulf states discover that billions cannot break Nvidia's grip on AI compute.
item.itunes:title: Apple Sues OpenAI for Trade Secret Theft, China's AI Agent Rules Take Effect, Gulf States Locked Into Nvidia
